calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There was no appearance, nor an objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Continued To Nov-30-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/30/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Continued To Sep-28-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
